---
title: "Workout data"
format: 
  dashboard:
    theme:
      light: [litera, custom.scss]
      dark: [darkly, custom.scss]
    scrolling: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="icon" href="favicon.svg" type="image/svg+xml">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@400;500&family=Inter:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: envelope
        href: mailto:teromeh@proton.me
      - icon: house
        href: ../
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)

data <- read.csv("user202919653_workout_history.csv")

title_font <- list(family = "Outfit, sans-serif", size = 14, color = "#1a1a1a")

activity_counts <- data |>
  count(Activity.Type, name = "maara") |>
  arrange(desc(maara))
```

## Row

### Column

```{r}
#| label: activity-types
plot_ly(activity_counts,
        x = ~maara,
        y = ~reorder(Activity.Type, maara),
        type = "bar",
        orientation = "h",
        marker = list(color = "#00BCD4"),
        hovertext = ~paste0(Activity.Type, ": ", maara, " kertaa"),
        hoverinfo = "text") |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "<b>Harjoitukset lajeittain</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    dragmode = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE,
                 showline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE),
    yaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, showline = FALSE,
                 zeroline = FALSE,
                 ticklabelposition = "outside",
                 ticklen = 10,
                 tickcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
                 tickfont = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 13,
                                 family = "Inter, sans-serif")),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor = "white",
    annotations = lapply(1:nrow(activity_counts), function(i) {
      list(
        x = activity_counts$maara[i],
        y = activity_counts$Activity.Type[i],
        text = paste0("<b>", activity_counts$maara[i], "</b>"),
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "left",
        xshift = 5,
        font = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 13, family = "Inter, sans-serif")
      )
    })
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```
